overall.description: A third-person perspective video game scene showing a character in a dark school uniform walking through a foggy, atmospheric Japanese forest at night. The character navigates past traditional wooden structures, through a large stone torii gate, and approaches a small shrine in a horror-themed environment with dense fog and autumn foliage.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy forest path with utility infrastructure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the forest path holding a knife, approaching a traditional house on the right

entered.detail: tall wooden utility pole with a single glowing lamp and multiple cross-arms
multiple electrical wires stretching between poles across the path
small Japanese-style wooden building with tiled roof and paper windows
narrow winding dirt trail covered with red autumn leaves
dense trees with vibrant red and orange autumn leaves lining the path

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow dirt path through a dense foggy forest with red autumn foliage. Utility poles with hanging wires line the path, and a traditional wooden Japanese house appears on the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest path approaching sacred stone gate

events.description: large stone torii gate emerges from the fog ahead, marking a sacred entrance

agents.ego_description: continuing along the forest path as man-made structures fade and the torii gate appears

entered.detail: traditional Japanese stone lantern partially obscured by vegetation
massive weathered stone torii gate with moss-covered pillars emerging from the fog

segments.scene_description: Continuing deeper into the forest as utility infrastructure gives way to natural surroundings. A large stone torii gate emerges from the fog ahead, marking the entrance to a sacred area.

scene_state.functional_zone: ascending stone steps through sacred torii gate

events.description: character ascends stone steps and passes through the massive torii gate
small wooden shrine structure becomes visible through the mist ahead

agents.ego_description: climbing mossy stone steps through the torii gate while holding a knife at the ready

entered.detail: weathered stone steps leading up through the torii gate, covered in moss and leaves
small traditional wooden shrine structure with curved roof visible through the fog

segments.scene_description: Ascending stone steps through the massive torii gate as the atmosphere grows more ominous. Beyond the gate, a small wooden shrine structure becomes visible through the mist, nestled among the dark trees.

events.description: character passes the wooden shrine structure on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking past the shrine and continuing deeper into the darker forest

entered.detail: large moss-covered boulders and rocks along the path edge

segments.scene_description: Passing the wooden shrine and continuing along the winding forest path into darker, denser woodland. The fog thickens as the character moves away from the shrine area into the deep forest.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a foggy autumn forest that transitions from a rural path into a sacred, ominous woodland. It begins along a narrow dirt path lined with utility poles and red foliage, passing a traditional wooden house on the right. As the camera moves deeper into the forest, the industrial infrastructure fades away and a large stone torii gate emerges from the mist. The scene then ascends stone steps through the gate toward a small wooden shrine nestled among dark trees, before continuing along a winding path where the fog thickens and the woodland grows denser and darker.
